title: ornithogalum maritimum
intro: Ornithogalum maritimum, also known as sea squill, is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, acting as an antiseptic, and showing potential in fighting certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum maritimum can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are often used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
